feature_name: Decimal, Decimal(P), Decimal(P, S), Decimal32(S), Decimal64(S), Decimal128(S), Decimal256(S)
sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_decimals (id Int32, value Decimal32(4)) ENGINE = Memory;
UPDATE test_decimals SET value = value * toDecimal32(2.5, 4) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, value, value / toDecimal32(3, 4) AS divided_value FROM test_decimals;
SELECT id, value + toDecimal32(1.0001, 4) AS incremented_value FROM test_decimals;
